security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob: asset: http://asset.localhost; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://api.github.com https://api.anthropic.com

bundle.shortDescription: Portable AI workspace on a USB-C SSD
bundle.longDescription: Arasul is a portable AI workspace on a USB-C SSD. Three-pane dashboard: filtered content tree, markdown editor, embedded Claude Code terminal. Zero host footprint.
